scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter fe-agri-nextjs-app exec tsc --noEmit --pretty && pnpm --filter bulletproof-react-vite exec tsc --noEmit --pretty && pnpm --filter fe-agri-nextjs-pages exec tsc --noEmit --pretty
scripts.check-before-push: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm --filter fe-agri-nextjs-app run build:cf && pnpm --filter bulletproof-react-vite run build && pnpm --filter fe-agri-nextjs-pages run build
